description: SQL Injection in GET /posts/search — keyword query parameter concatenated into LIKE clause via string concatenation without parameterization
SSRF in GET /posts/preview-image — user-controlled 'url' parameter fetched server-side via requests.get() without validation or allowlist
Command Injection in convert_image() — user-supplied filename parameter interpolated into shell command string with shell=True
Path Traversal in get_file_content() — user-supplied filename joined to UPLOAD_DIR without canonicalization or boundary check
Weak password hashing — hashlib.md5 used to hash passwords before storing in database; MD5 is cryptographically broken and unsuitable for password storage
Hardcoded API secret key — API_SECRET_KEY assigned a literal string value committed to source code, exposing the signing key
